title: NQBlade Performance 2026
author: Some_Fly_4552
selftext: Hello, here’s the performance of the Algo, this year with a starting capital of 3000$ and a medium-low risk for a live trading account with 4% risk per trade. Went pretty well i would say. In February, you can see some losses, on some of those days we told our users to disable the Algo trading on those days, so it isn’t 100% accurate. If you’d like to try it out DM me we have got a free month trial✌️
